texto: She'd not known grief would come in waves, brought on by the smallest of things. Nor had she realized that ordinary acts of living would continue even after the loss of a love and that it would remain possible to get caught up in the moment of a simple pleasure before remembering.
explicacao: Citação de Tess Thompson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “She'd not known grief would come in waves, brought on by the smallest of things. Nor had she real…” articula reflexao, grief, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
